overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through the historic city of Saint Denis on a foggy, rainy night. The character traverses a park garden, exits onto cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps, encounters a passing tram, and continues toward a theater district with glowing marquee signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: park garden with benches and flower beds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a park path lined with benches and flower beds in the rain

entered.detail: large oak trees with dense canopy lining the park path
raised flower beds with red and pink blooms along the path edge
wooden park benches with iron armrests facing the flower beds
black wrought iron fence marking the park boundary
ornate cast iron gas lamps emitting warm yellow light through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rain-soaked park garden at night. Gas lamps cast a warm glow through the fog, illuminating wooden benches and flower beds lining the paved path. An iron fence runs along the right side, with dense tree canopy overhead blocking the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street with historic buildings and wrought iron balconies

events.description: exits park through iron gate onto cobblestone street with historic buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along wet cobblestone streets past historic buildings with gas lamps and wrought iron balconies

entered.detail: three-story stone buildings with arched windows and decorative cornices
intricate black wrought iron railings on second-floor balconies
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the gas lamp light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the park through an iron gate, the scene opens onto a cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings featuring ornate wrought iron balconies. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of gas lamps as the character walks past the building facades, with park trees now visible only in the far distance.

events.description: tram approaches from the left and passes across the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street as a tram passes by from the left

notable_agents.action: red and black tram moving from left to right across the intersection

entered.detail: vintage red and black tram with illuminated windows moving along tracks

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wider intersection where a vintage red tram passes from left to right. The tram's interior lights glow warmly against the rainy night as it crosses the cobblestone street. Historic buildings remain visible on the right, now at a middle distance as the character crosses the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with illuminated theater marquee

events.description: enters narrower street with theater marquee visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow street toward an illuminated theater marquee

entered.detail: illuminated vertical theater sign with glowing letters spelling out the venue name

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrower commercial street, the character walks toward a brightly lit theater marquee glowing in the distance. The historic buildings now line both sides of the cobblestone path more closely, with the tram having passed behind. Gas lamps continue to illuminate the wet street as the character approaches the theater entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban landscape that transitions from a secluded park garden into a bustling, illuminated theater district. It begins along a paved path under a dense tree canopy, where gas lamps cast a warm glow through the fog over wooden benches and flower beds. As the character exits through an iron gate, the scene opens onto a cobblestone street where the wet ground reflects the light of lamps and the ornate balconies of historic stone buildings. The camera then moves through a wide intersection as a vintage red tram passes from left to right, its interior lights glowing against the rainy night. Finally, the view narrows into a commercial street lined with buildings on both sides, moving steadily toward the bright, glowing marquee of a theater entrance.
